mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=EXTAPI_01-005#selectA005UserByUserId */ TMU.USER_ID, TMU.USER_NM, TMU.PASSWORD, TMU.PRIV_ID, TMU.BRANCH_ID, TMU.BROKER_ID, TMU.SUB_BROKER_ID, TMU.EMPLOYEE_ID, TMU.EMPLOYEE_NAME, TMU.GOVERNOR_FLAG, TMU.MAIL_ADDRESS FROM TB_MED_USERS TMU WHERE TMU.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @EXTAPI_01-005#insertA005MedUsers */ INTO TB_MED_USERS( USER_ID, USER_NM, PASSWORD, LASTPWUPTIME, PRIV_ID, BRANCH_ID, BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, GOVERNOR_FLAG, LOGIN_STATUS, PARTNER_USER_ID, PARTNER_USER_PW, CCS_USER_ID, CCS_USER_PW, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPTIMESTAMP_USER, UPTIMESTAMP_TIME, MAIL_ADDRESS ) VALUES ( #{req.userId}, #{req.userNm}, #{req.password}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.privId}, #{req.branchId}, #{req.brokerId}, #{req.subBrokerId}, #{req.employeeId}, #{req.employeeName}, #{req.governorFlag}, #{req.loginStatus}, #{req.partnerUserId}, #{req.partnerUserPw}, #{req.ccsUserId}, #{req.ccsUserPw}, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.uptimestampUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.mailAddress} )

INSERT /* @EXTAPI_01-005#insertA005UserPriv */ INTO TB_MED_USERS_PRIV( USER_ID, SEQ_NO, BRANCH_ID, BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, DELETE_FLG, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, DELETE_USER, DELETE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{req.userId}, SEQ_TB_MED_USERS_PRIV.NEXTVAL, #{req.branchId}, #{req.brokerId}, #{req.subBrokerId}, #{req.employeeId}, #{req.employeeName}, #{req.deleteFlg}, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.deleteUser}, #{req.deleteTime} )

INSERT /* @EXTAPI_01-005#insertA005VerifyUser */ INTO TB_MED_VERIFY_USERS( USER_ID, MAIL_ADDRESS, VERIFY_STATUS, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_DATE ) SELECT #{req.userId} As USER_ID, #{req.mailAddress} As MAIL_ADDRESS, #{req.verifyStatus} As VERIFY_STATUS, #{req.updateBy} As UPDATE_BY, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE As UPDATE_DATE FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM M_CODE WHERE CODE_TYPE = '37' AND CODE_1 = '3' AND CODE_2 = #{req.privId} AND (START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AND (END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') OR END_DATE IS NULL) )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @EXTAPI_01-006#selectA006User */ * FROM ( SELECT TMU.USER_ID, 0 AS SEQ_NO, TMU.USER_NM, TMU.PASSWORD, TMU.PRIV_ID, '1' AS PARENT_USER_FLAG, TMU.BRANCH_ID AS BRANCH_CODE, B.BRANCH_NAME, TMU.BROKER_ID AS BROKER_CODE, MB2.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_NAME, TMU.SUB_BROKER_ID AS BROKER_BRANCH_CODE, MB.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_BRANCH_NAME, CASE WHEN TMU.EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND TMU.EMPLOYEE_ID != '0000' THEN TMU.EMPLOYEE_ID ELSE '0000' END AS EMPLOYEE_ID, CASE WHEN TMU.EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND TMU.EMPLOYEE_ID != '0000' THEN TMU.EMPLOYEE_NAME ELSE '仲介業者担当' END AS EMPLOYEE_NAME, TMU.GOVERNOR_FLAG, TMU.CCS_USER_ID, TMU.MAIL_ADDRESS FROM TB_MED_USERS TMU LEFT OUTER JOIN BRANCH B ON TMU.BRANCH_ID = B.BRANCH_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB ON TMU.BROKER_ID = MB.BROKER_CODE AND TMU.SUB_BROKER_ID = MB.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB2 ON TMU.BROKER_ID = MB2.BROKER_CODE AND MB2.BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' UNION ALL SELECT TMUP.USER_ID, TMUP.SEQ_NO, NULL AS USER_NM, NULL AS ASSWORD, NULL AS PRIV_ID, '0' AS PARENT_USER_FLAG, TMUP.BRANCH_ID AS BRANCH_CODE, B.BRANCH_NAME, TMUP.BROKER_ID AS BROKER_CODE, MB2.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_NAME, TMUP.SUB_BROKER_ID AS BROKER_BRANCH_CODE, MB.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_BRANCH_NAME, CASE WHEN TMUP.EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND TMUP.EMPLOYEE_ID != '0000' THEN TMUP.EMPLOYEE_ID ELSE '0000' END AS EMPLOYEE_ID, CASE WHEN TMUP.EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND TMUP.EMPLOYEE_ID != '0000' THEN TMUP.EMPLOYEE_NAME ELSE '仲介業者担当' END AS EMPLOYEE_NAME, NULL AS GOVERNOR_FLAG, NULL AS CCS_USER_ID, NULL AS MAIL_ADDRESS FROM TB_MED_USERS_PRIV TMUP LEFT OUTER JOIN BRANCH B ON TMUP.BRANCH_ID = B.BRANCH_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB ON TMUP.BROKER_ID = MB.BROKER_CODE AND TMUP.SUB_BROKER_ID = MB.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB2 ON TMUP.BROKER_ID = MB2.BROKER_CODE AND MB2.BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' ) WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY SEQ_NO

SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USER_NM , A.PRIV_ID , A.BRANCH_ID AS BRANCH_CODE , C.BRANCH_NAME , A.BROKER_ID AS BROKER_CODE , B.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_NAME , A.SUB_BROKER_ID AS BROKER_BRANCH_CODE , E.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_BRANCH_NAME , A.EMPLOYEE_ID , A.EMPLOYEE_NAME , A.MAIL_ADDRESS FROM TB_MED_USERS A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT BROKER_CODE , BRANCH_NAME FROM MEDIATE_BRANCH WHERE BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' ) B ON A.BROKER_ID = B.BROKER_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN BRANCH C ON A.BRANCH_ID = C.BRANCH_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH E ON A.BROKER_ID = E.BROKER_CODE AND A.SUB_BROKER_ID = E.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.BROKER_ID LIKE '%' || #{req.brokerCode} || '%'
AND UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE( UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE(B.BRANCH_NAME)) , 'KANA_FWKATAKANA' ) LIKE '%' || UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE( UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE(#{req.brokerOrBranchName})) , 'KANA_FWKATAKANA' ) || '%'
AND UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE( UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE(A.USER_NM)) , 'KANA_FWKATAKANA' ) LIKE '%' || UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE( UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE(#{req.employeeName})) , 'KANA_FWKATAKANA' ) || '%'
AND A.MAIL_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{req.mailAddress} || '%'
